user.title: TaskOrganizer Setup
user.description: Do you want to set up the TaskOrganizer integration?

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of TaskOrganizer is allowed.

reset_monthly_points.name: Reset monthly points
reset_monthly_points.description: Manually resets all roommate points to 0 and archives the month.

factory_reset.name: Factory reset
factory_reset.description: Deletes all tasks, history and points.

complete_task_by_name.name: Complete task
complete_task_by_name.description: Marks a task as completed by its exact name.

task_name.name: Task name
task_name.description: The exact name of the task.

add_task.name: Add task
add_task.description: Creates a new recurring or one-time task. Can be created from scratch or based on a template.

template.name: Template (Optional)
template.description: The name of a template to use. Fills in other fields if they are not provided.

name.name: Name (Optional if template is used)
name.description: What should the task be called?

area.name: Area (Optional)
area.description: Which area does the task belong to?

interval.name: Interval (Days, Optional)
interval.description: How often does it need to be done? 0 for one-time tasks. If not set, taken from template or defaults to 7.

complexity.name: Points (1-10, Optional)
complexity.description: How many points is it worth?

assignees.name: Assignees (Optional)
assignees.description: Who is responsible? (Comma separated user IDs or person.name entities).

override_overdue_days.name: Days until overdue (optional)
override_overdue_days.description: Overrides the global setting for the number of days after which this task is considered overdue.

set_task_due_by_name.name: Set task due
set_task_due_by_name.description: Marks a task as due immediately by its exact name.

task_name.name: Task name
task_name.description: The exact name of the task.

pause_task_by_name.name: Pause task
pause_task_by_name.description: Pauses a task until a specific date by its exact name.

task_name.name: Task name
task_name.description: The exact name of the task.

pause_until.name: Pause until
pause_until.description: The date until which the task should be paused (e.g., '2024-12-31').

remove_task_by_name.name: Remove task
remove_task_by_name.description: Removes a task by its exact name.

task_name.name: Task name
task_name.description: The exact name of the task to remove.

edit_task_by_name.name: Edit task
edit_task_by_name.description: Edits an existing task by its exact name.

task_name.name: Task name
task_name.description: The exact name of the task to edit.

new_name.name: New Name (Optional)
new_name.description: The new name for the task.

area.name: Area (Optional)
area.description: Which area does the task belong to?

interval.name: Interval (Days, Optional)
interval.description: How often does it need to be done?

complexity.name: Points (1-10, Optional)
complexity.description: How many points is it worth?

assignees.name: Assignees (Optional)
assignees.description: Who is responsible? (Comma separated user IDs or person.name entities).

name.name: Name
name.description: What should the template be called?

area.name: Area (Optional)
area.description: Which area does the task belong to?

interval.name: Interval (Days, Optional)
interval.description: How often does it need to be done?

complexity.name: Points (1-10, Optional)
complexity.description: How many points is it worth?

assignees.name: Assignees (Optional)
assignees.description: Who is responsible? (Comma separated user IDs or person.name entities).

remove_template_by_name.name: Remove template
remove_template_by_name.description: Removes a template by its exact name.

template_name.name: Template name
template_name.description: The exact name of the template to remove.

edit_template_by_name.name: Edit template
edit_template_by_name.description: Edits an existing template by its exact name.

template_name.name: Template name
template_name.description: The exact name of the template to edit.

new_name.name: New Name (Optional)
new_name.description: The new name for the template.

area.name: Area (Optional)
area.description: Which area does the task belong to?

interval.name: Interval (Days, Optional)
interval.description: How often does it need to be done?

complexity.name: Points (1-10, Optional)
complexity.description: How many points is it worth?

assignees.name: Assignees (Optional)
assignees.description: Who is responsible? (Comma separated user IDs or person.name entities).
